◎简　　介  

　　Many people criticize a film based on how close it relates and carries over from its novel or written form.However, knowing up front that this film is NOT the book and dares to actually go in different directions than the book, may allow for aviewer to be a bit more open about the point of the story and not necessarily the story itself.I adore the novel.
